description: Style Note Being fashionable means being able to combine the right amount of comfort with a bucket load of style in your outfit. Wranger goes charming and cute with this comfortable tank top. Pair it with your favourite pair of jeans and flip flops and accessorise subtly. Product Details A blue and white horizontally striped top, has graphic print in the front and transparent sequined designs, short raglan sleeves with a tab stitched over the shoulders and ruched detailing at the shoulder and a round neck Material and Care 100% cotton Hand wash cold using a mild detergent with like colours Do not bleach Do not iron on print or embellishments Do not tumble dry or wring Flat dry in shade Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
